toast.saveActiveDesc: Version {version} has been saved and activated.
toast.saveDraftDesc: Version {version} has been saved as a draft.
toast.activateDesc: Version {version} is now the active version.

empty.title: No instruments found
empty.description: Upload your first instrument definition to get started.

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.confirmActivate: This will immediately replace the current active instrument for all auditors. In-progress audits will continue using their started version.
versionHistory.confirmActivateWithVersion: Publishing {version} will activate it as version {nextVersion}, the next number in your published sequence. In-progress audits keep the version they started on.
versionHistory.confirmDeleteDraft: Delete draft {version}? This removes the draft branch from version history and cannot be undone.
versionHistory.confirmDeleteInactive: Delete inactive version {version}? Only unused inactive versions can be removed.
versionHistory.confirmDeleteGeneric: Delete this draft version? This action cannot be undone.
versionHistory.deleteBlockedInUse: This version is used by {count} {count, plural, one {audit} other {audits}} and cannot be deleted.
versionHistory.versioningHelp: Active {activeVersion} · new drafts become {nextDraftExample} · publishing becomes {nextPublishedExample}
versionHistory.confirmDeleteBranchWarning: This version has {count} draft {count, plural, one {branch} other {branches}} ({versions}). Deleting it will make {count, plural, one {it} other {them}} independent.
versionHistory.orphanedHelp: This was a draft branch of a deleted version. It is now independent.
versionHistory.toggleBranches: Toggle draft branches from this version
versionHistory.toggleBranchesHelp: Click to show or hide draft branches created from this version
versionHistory.expandBranchesAria: Show or hide draft branches of version {version}
versionHistory.childBranchAria: Child draft branch, not independently expandable
versionHistory.noBranches: No draft branches from this version yet.

upload.title: Upload Instrument JSON
upload.description: Upload a PlayspaceInstrumentResponse-shaped JSON file to create a new instrument version.
upload.filePlaceholder: Click or drag a .json file here
upload.errorJsonObj: File must contain a JSON object.

activate.title: Activate instrument version
activate.description: This will deactivate all other versions and make this one the active source of truth. Continue?

content.editDraftDesc: Editing a copy of version {version}. Changes will be saved as a new version.
content.draftVersionHelp: Draft version is automatically derived from the active version.
content.title: Instrument Content
content.noContent: No content available for this language.
content.newLanguagePrompt: Enter the language code for the new translation (e.g. 'de', 'es'):
content.confirmRemoveLanguage: Are you sure you want to remove the {lang} translation? This cannot be undone.
content.keyLockedHint: Locked while translating - edit this key in {lang}.
content.baseLanguageHint: Base language - keys and structure are edited here.
content.coverageTooltip: {translated} of {total} translatable fields differ from the base language.
content.translationBannerBody: Keys, scoring, and structure are managed in the base language. Only display text is editable here; untranslated fields automatically fall back to the base language.
content.addLanguageDesc: Pick a language and the source to copy its structure from. Keys and structure stay in sync with the base language; you then translate the display text.
content.addLanguageCopyHint: The new language starts as a copy of this one. Its text becomes the starting point you translate.
content.aiTranslateDesc: Automatically draft {target} from {base} for every untranslated field, keeping keys and structure untouched.
content.aiTranslateComingSoon: This is a preview of an upcoming premium feature. AI auto-translation isn't enabled yet - translations are still entered manually.
content.aiTranslateFieldTooltip: Premium · coming soon - translate just this text block with AI, leaving keys and structure untouched.
content.spreadsheetDescription: All {count} questions in a flat table view
content.noResults: No questions match the current filters.
content.legalDocumentsDescription: Terms and Privacy Notice shown to auditors during onboarding.
content.noLegalDocuments: No legal documents. Add a Terms or Privacy document to display during onboarding.
content.noBullets: No bullet points in this section.
content.reviewDescription: Review the detected changes before publishing. This will deactivate all other versions.
content.noChanges: No changes detected between these versions.
